name: Automated Expense Management - Discord Receipt RPA Prototype

parameters.content:
Expected POST body from your Discord bot:

{
  "discordUser": "Paul Krus",
  "discordUserId": "123456789",
  "messageTimestamp": "2026-05-25T14:14:34.000Z",
  "submittedDate": "2026-05-25",
  "messageId": "discord-message-id",
  "channelId": "discord-channel-id",
  "imageBase64": "base64_receipt_image_here",
  "mimeType": "image/jpeg",
  "authorIsBot": false
}

The Discord bot must:
1. Filter out messages where author.bot === true before POSTing
2. Convert the Discord attachment image to base64 before sending

value.label: info
value.details: =Calling LLM extraction for message {{ $('Normalize Discord Input').item.json.messageId || '(no id)' }}

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: ={{ [{ role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'You are extracting expense receipt data for an RPA workflow. Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown. Schema: {"ReceiptDetected": boolean, "Merchant": string|null, "ReceiptDate": string|null (format DD-MM-YYYY), "Currency": string|null, "TotalAmount": number|null, "VATAmount": number|null, "VATIncluded": "Yes"|"No"|null, "Category": string|null, "PaymentMethod": string|null, "ReceiptId": string|null, "BusinessPurpose": string|null, "Confidence": number, "Notes": string|null}. If standard groceries or restaurant use Category: Food / Meals. If corporate transaction use PaymentMethod: Company Card. If image is not a receipt set ReceiptDetected false and all receipt fields null.' }, { type: 'image_url', image_url: { url: 'data:' + $('Normalize Discord Input').first().json.mimeType + ';base64,' + $('Normalize Discord Input').first().json.imageBase64 } }] }] }}

value.label: info
value.details: Submission halted — AI unavailable. Final status: Rejected.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ ok: false, status: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.status, event: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.logEvent, details: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.details }) }}

value.label: info
value.details: =Submission halted — {{ $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.logEvent }}. Final status: Rejected.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ ok: false, status: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.status, event: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.logEvent, details: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.details }) }}

value.label: info
value.details: =Appended row to Receipts as Pending Review. Range: {{ $json.updates?.updatedRange || $json.tableRange || 'unknown' }}

value.label: info
value.details: Submission processed end-to-end. Final status: Pending Review.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ ok: true, status: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.status, event: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.logEvent, details: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.details, missingFields: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.missingFields }) }}

value.label: error
value.details: Failed to append Pending Review row to Google Sheets.

parameters.name: content
parameters.value: ={{ '<@' + $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.discordUserId + '> ⚠️ Your receipt was processed but could not be saved to the expense sheet. Please contact the accountant.' }}

value.label: info
value.details: =Appended row to Receipts as Approved by Bot. Range: {{ $json.updates?.updatedRange || $json.tableRange || 'unknown' }}

value.label: info
value.details: Submission processed end-to-end. Final status: Approved by Bot.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ ok: true, status: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.status, event: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.logEvent, details: $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.details }) }}

value.label: error
value.details: Failed to append Approved by Bot row to Google Sheets.

parameters.name: content
parameters.value: ={{ '<@' + $('Parse AI Response and Validate').item.json.discordUserId + '> ⚠️ Your receipt was processed but could not be saved to the expense sheet. Please contact the accountant.' }}

parameters.content:
Set these in your n8n environment/config:

LLM_BASE_URL=https://api.anthropic.com/v1
LLM_API_KEY=your_anthropic_key
LLM_MODEL=claude-sonnet-4-20250514
DISCORD_LOG_WEBHOOK_URL=https://discord.com/api/webhooks/...
DISCORD_ACCOUNTANT_ROLE_ID=...           (used by Logging Subworkflow on log-write failure)
GOOGLE_SHEETS_SPREADSHEET_ID=your_google_sheet_id

MongoDB credential in n8n:
mongodb://admin:password@mongo:27017/expense_rpa?authSource=admin

Sheet column order (must match rowValues in Parse node):
Employee Name | Submitted Date | Receipt Date | Merchant
| Expense Category | Payment Method | Currency
| Total Amount | VAT Included | VAT Amount | Status

Log event taxonomy (logs collection in MongoDB):
  SubmissionReceived    (info)
  AIExtractionRequested (info)
  AIUnavailable         (error)
  AIResponseInvalid     (error)
  AIResponseReceived    (info)
  NoReceiptDetected     (warning)
  MissingRequiredFields (warning)
  SheetAppendSucceeded  (info)
  SheetAppendFailed     (error)
  WorkflowCompleted     (info)

Document shape per log (enforced by the logging subworkflow):
  label, event, logTimestamp, messageId,
  discordUser, messageTimestamp, details,
  N8NStackTrace (only on errors)

IMPORTANT: Import the Logging Subworkflow first,
then replace 6Z9jJBQnvvtMps1A in every Log - * node
with its workflow ID from the n8n URL.

All user-facing Discord notifications (success, missing fields,
no receipt, AI unavailable, sheet-write failed) post to
DISCORD_LOG_WEBHOOK_URL via HTTP — no Discord bot credential
or channelId placeholder needed in the workflow.

meta.description: Main AccountantBot workflow. Calls the Logging Subworkflow for all log events with retry logic. Posts user-facing Discord notifications via DISCORD_LOG_WEBHOOK_URL on every terminal branch (Approved, Pending Review, No Receipt, AI Unavailable, Sheet write failed).
